title: Justice | Equality, Fairness & Equity | Britannica
content: justice, Inphilosophy, the concept of a proper proportion between a person's deserts (whatismerited) and the good and bad things that befall or are allotted to him or her. Aristotle 's discussion of the virtue ofjusticehas been the starting point for almost all Western accounts.
